raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un dewe Sinnu/ ka tee
apfargatu tahs uskahpjamäs
Kalnu-Weetas/ jo zaur win-
rähin bij ja-eet us Judu-Sem-
mi/ un tur bija gann lehti teem
pakak-dsibt/ kas uskahpt grib-
beja/ jo ta zaureijama Weeta
bija tieſchaura/ ka tik diwi Wih-
ri warreja kohva zaur eet.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee Israëka Behrni dar-
rija/ ka winneem Jojakims tas
Augstajs-Preesteris bij paweh-
lejs/ ta patt arri wiffee Wezza-
jee to Israëta Lauschu/ kas Je-
rusaleme bija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wisß Israëls brehze ue
Deewu ar leetu Peeſaufschann/
un pasemmoja tawas Dwehfe-
les fohti warren.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Lihds ar fawahin See-
wahm/ un ar faweem Behr-
neem/ un ar faweemi Lohpeem:
Ta patt arri wiſfi Eebuweetchi
un Algadschi/ un winnu ar
Nauda pirkti Wehrat/ un tikte
Maisus ap taween Gurneem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wisß Israëka Wihri/
un Seewas un Behrni un Je-
rusalemes Gedsihwotaji mettehe
preekſch ta Deewa Namna
Seimne/ un kaſſija Belnus ue
fawahm Galwahm/ un isplehte
fawus Matins preekſch ta KUN-
GA/ tee arrt pawrwilte to Alta-
ri ar weenu Matfu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un brehze gnuscht us te-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "ka tas winnu Behrnus par La-
vijumu ne nodobtu/ nedß ta-
Seeivas tai Aplaupifcham
ncds winnu eemantotus Pi-
fahius tai Izedeldechanaſ/ ne-
tahs fwehtas Leetas par Saga-
nitchanu un Apkaunaſchan-
pahr ko tee Pagani preczatobe-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Deews paklauffia wi-
no Luhafchann/ un isglahbe to-
no winnu Behdahn/ un wi-
Jndu Semines un Jerusalen-
Fedsihwotaji garveja dandß D-
nas preeſch ta Kunga ta W-
warrena fwehtas Weetas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Jojakims tas Au-
stajs-Preesteris un wisß Pre-
ri/ kas ta Kunga Preeſcha fi-
weja/ un kas tam Kungam fi-
poja Matins ap fweetin Gi-
neem aplikkuſchi/ uppureja to-
mittejamu Uypuri/ un Lu-
ſchanas/ un fabprahtigas Lo-
schu Dahwanas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Belni bija ue win-
Zeppurehm/ un brehze ue-
Kungu ar wisß Spehtu/ ta-
wisß to Israëta Namnu ſch-
ligi gibbetu usluhkoht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta V. Nodalla.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
